ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "batch" INTEGER /* Batch number of the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of study (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" TEXT /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic progress record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "academic_rate" INTEGER /* Academic performance rate (out of 5) */,
  "internship_rate" INTEGER /* Internship experience rate (out of 5) */,
  "course_load" INTEGER /* Current course load */,
  "course_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of courses completed */,
  "course_failed" INTEGER /* Total number of courses failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career preference */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Current career preference (e.g., Doing business, Programming) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Preferred industry (e.g., Tech, Finance) */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Preferred job function (e.g., Data Analyst, Software Engineer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_preferences_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_aspirations" (
  "aspiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career aspiration */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "aspiration" TEXT /* Career aspiration (e.g., Pursue a master's degree, Working) */,
  "career_goal" TEXT /* Specific career goal (e.g., Become a manager, Start a business) */,
  "target_company" TEXT /* Target company for career aspiration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aspiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_aspirations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_paths" (
  "path_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career path */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "path" TEXT /* Career path chosen (e.g., Entrepreneurship, Researcher) */,
  "path_description" TEXT /* Description of the chosen career path */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("path_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_paths_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country preferred by the student (e.g., Japan, Cambodia) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City preferred by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career type */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "type" TEXT /* Career type chosen (e.g., Data Scientist, Web Development) */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the chosen career type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_types_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update made (e.g., career preference, career aspiration) */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_updates_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_preference_industries" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the career preference */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id", "industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the job function */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Description of the job function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_preference_job_functions" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the career preference */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job function */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id", "function_id")
)
